children.text: be subject to the same requirements, responsibilities, and penalties as are applicable to examiners under the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.] and title LXII of the Revised Statutes; and12 U.S.C. 221
have, in the exercise of functions under this chapter, the same powers and privileges as are vested in such examiners by law.
